case_title: JOEKASY TATIS VS. NETWORK APPLIANCE, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TATIS, JOEKASY AS TO DEFENDANT NETWORK APPLIANCE, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TATIS, JOEKASY AS TO DEFENDANT NETWORK APPLIANCE, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION
